name: Lumiere
concept: Luxury makeup giveaway (sweepstakes): enter email to win a $500 beauty bundle; closing CTA = 20% off coupon to shop the store.
styleSignature: elegant luxury beauty editorial, soft glamorous lighting, blush pink rose-gold champagne and cream palette with deep plum accents, marble and silk textures, subtle gold foil, refined feminine sophistication, premium cosmetics, shallow depth of field, aspirational. No text, no words, no letters.
buttonStrategy: ONE image CTA = assets/img/btn-shop.png (SHOP THE COLLECTION). All other buttons (Enter to Win, nav) are CSS .btn.
